milestone: v2_6_99 — Engine Bossa Nova Style Baseline Phase Completion Checkpoint
scope: Freeze the Bossa Nova v2_6_90-v2_6_98 full-band baseline as a phase-completion checkpoint. This stamps summary metadata and generates final Blue Bossa 3x/5x demos only; it does not add vocabulary, alter weights, change expression numbers, modify core voicing, restore bar-first logic, or touch API/Agent/HarmonyOS.

static_audit.contract: v2_6_99 is a metadata/audit/demo checkpoint only. It does not add pattern vocabulary, change candidate weights, alter expression numeric calibration, modify core voicing, restore bar-first/two_chord_bar routing, create a parallel selector, or touch API/Agent/HarmonyOS.
